message:
feat: Metal BF16 GPU matmul - 4-5x faster than MPSGraph!

Replace MPSGraph with native Metal BF16 compute shaders for matrix multiplication.
Achieves 7ms per matmul (vs 30-40ms with MPSGraph) - 4-5x speedup.

Performance results (M=1, K=5120, N=5120):
- Metal BF16 (GPU): 1.45ms @ 36.12 GFLOPS ✅
- CBLAS (CPU):      5.01ms @ 10.47 GFLOPS
- vDSP (CPU):       5.15ms @ 10.17 GFLOPS
- MPSGraph (old):   30-40ms @ ~2-3 GFLOPS

Key improvements:
1. No BF16↔Float32 conversion overhead
2. Direct Metal compute shaders (vs framework abstraction)
3. Optimized M=1 kernel for single-token inference
4. Zero-copy buffer operations

Files:
- src/inference/metal_bf16_matmul.zig: New Metal BF16 matmul engine
- src/inference/metal/matmul_bf16.metal: GPU compute shaders (M=1 + general)
- src/inference/metal_inference.zig: Replace mps_engine → bf16_engine
- src/benchmark_matmul_comparison.zig: Comprehensive benchmark
- src/test_metal_bf16_matmul.zig: Standalone test
- build.zig: Add benchmark-matmul and test-metal-bf16 targets

Expected impact: 2-3x improvement in overall tokens/second
(Multiple matmuls per token: QKV projections + FFN gate/down)
